footer.tagline: Market intelligence and partnerships for Asian food & beverage brands entering NYC.
footer.stayUpdatedBody: Get notified about new guides and partnerships.

home.subtitle: BridgeEast connects Asian F&B founders with curated market data, step-by-step guides, and vetted local partners—everything needed to navigate your first NYC location.

marketData.title: Market Data
marketData.description: Neighborhood-level rent benchmarks, foot traffic, and competitive density insights.

curatedGuides.title: Curated Guides
curatedGuides.description: Phase-based playbooks: visas, permits, leasing, hiring, sourcing, and localization.

partnerDirectory.title: Partner Directory
partnerDirectory.description: Pre-vetted specialists: brokers, attorneys, distributors, PR, accountants.

home.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your NYC Journey?
home.ctaBody: Join hundreds of Asian F&B founders who trust BridgeEast for their expansion decisions.

listings.title: Browse expansion-ready sellers and live concept listings
listings.subtitle: Review seller concepts, discover who is verified, and jump into individual seller profiles to track their current expansion plans.

listingDetail.inquiryBody: Review the latest seller and buyer messages before reaching out.
listingDetail.sidebarBody: Use the seller profile to review verification status, then open the inquiry thread if you need translated seller responses.

inquiryThread.title: Seller and buyer conversation
inquiryThread.subtitle: Translate seller replies on demand. Nothing is translated automatically.
inquiryThread.empty: No messages available for this listing yet.
inquiryThread.sampleNotice: Sample conversation shown because no saved inquiry thread exists yet.

seller.verificationBody: Verified sellers receive a green checkmark badge on their profile and listings. Uploaded documents are stored privately in Supabase Storage.
seller.getVerifiedBody: Upload a government ID, proof of business ownership, and optionally a business license. Once submitted, your profile moves to pending review in the admin panel.
seller.submitSuccess: Documents uploaded. Your verification request is now pending review.

admin.title: Verification and listing moderation
admin.subtitle: Review pending seller verification requests, open private verification documents, and moderate seller listings from a single dashboard.
admin.unlockBody: This admin route uses a hardcoded email check. Enter the configured admin email to continue.

translate.failed: Unable to translate this text right now.

errors.adminUnauthorized: That email is not allowed into the admin panel.
errors.loadAdmin: Unable to load the admin dashboard.
errors.translationFailed: Unable to translate this text right now.
errors.translationMissingConfig: Translation is unavailable until ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is configured.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

title.label: Listing title
title.placeholder: Lotus Dumpling Studio - Williamsburg pop-up to permanent

description.label: Listing description
description.placeholder: Describe the concept, expansion target, and space requirements.
